task_completion.description: Extract hardcoded dimension values into the base dimens.xml file with semantic names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open editor tab for 'app/src/main/res/values/dimens.xml' showing <dimen> tags with semantic names and values such as 16dp, 24dp, 80dp, or 14sp.

task_completion.description: Create a tablet-specific resource directory and dimens.xml file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'values-sw600dp' directory containing a 'dimens.xml' file in the Android Studio Project tool window, or an editor tab indicating the file is for sw600dp.

task_completion.description: Increase the dimension values in the tablet-specific dimens.xml file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of the tablet 'dimens.xml' file showing <dimen> tags with the same semantic names as the base file, but with larger values (e.g., greater than 16dp, 24dp, etc.).

task_completion.description: Update the original layout file to reference the new dimension resources.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'activity_profile.xml' open in the editor, showing layout attributes (like layout_width, layout_margin, textSize) using '@dimen/...' references instead of hardcoded values.

task_completion.description: Verify the project builds successfully after the refactoring.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Build' tool window at the bottom of Android Studio showing a successful build message, such as 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' or a green checkmark indicating the Gradle build finished without errors.

integrity.description: The agent used Android Studio to edit the XML files and manage the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Android Studio IDE interface being used to navigate the project and edit files, rather than a basic text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The build was actually executed using the Android Studio build system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine Gradle build output in the Build tool window, rather than a mocked text file or terminal echo command claiming success.

integrity.description: The agent edited the XML files through the IDE editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the cursor or text selection in the Android Studio editor tabs for the XML files, ensuring the agent didn't just use terminal commands like 'sed' to modify the files invisibly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/SocialApp. The layout file is app/src/main/res/layout/activity_profile.xml. The base dimensions file is app/src/main/res/values/dimens.xml. The tablet dimensions file must be created at app/src/main/res/values-sw600dp/dimens.xml. The layout file initially contains hardcoded values like 16dp, 24dp, 80dp, and 14sp. The agent must replace these with @dimen references, define them in the base dimens.xml, and provide larger values in the tablet dimens.xml.
